source_description: In a busy coffee shop, Chandler and Joey sit on a couch facing a low table. Ross stands behind the couch, holding a multi-page letter in one hand. Looking at Chandler and Joey, Ross says, "To take responsibility for everything that went wrong in our relationship."

In a busy coffee shop, Chandler and Joey sit on a couch facing a low table. Ross stands behind the couch, holding a multi-page letter in one hand. Looking at Chandler and Joey, Ross says, "To take responsibility for everything that went wrong in our relationship."

In a busy coffee shop, Chandler and Joey sit on a couch facing a low table. Ross stands behind the couch, holding a multi-page letter in one hand. Looking at Chandler and Joey, Ross says, "To take responsibility for everything that went wrong in our relationship."
Ross gestures with the letter and leans forward slightly. He says, "I mean, she goes on for five pages about about how I was unfaithful to her." Joey looks up at Ross.
Ross gestures with the letter and leans forward slightly. He says, "I mean, she goes on for five pages about about how I was unfaithful to her." Joey looks up at Ross.
Ross gestures with the letter and leans forward slightly. He says, "I mean, she goes on for five pages about about how I was unfaithful to her." Joey looks up at Ross.
Ross lowers the letter slightly, maintaining eye contact with Chandler and Joey.
Ross leans further forward, his volume rising to a shout as he says, "We were on a break."
Chandler quickly brings both hands to his face, leaning his head back. He lowers his hands and says, "Oh, my God. If you say that one more time, I'm going to break up with you."
Chandler quickly brings both hands to his face, leaning his head back. He lowers his hands and says, "Oh, my God. If you say that one more time, I'm going to break up with you."
Chandler quickly brings both hands to his face, leaning his head back. He lowers his hands and says, "Oh, my God. If you say that one more time, I'm going to break up with you."
Ross looks away briefly, his jaw tightening.

Ross points a finger toward Chandler and says, "Fine. But this breakup was not all my fault." Ross then looks down at the letter in his hands and reads, "And she says here, if you accept full responsibility full"

Ross looks up at Chandler and Joey, raising his voice slightly on the word "responsibility?", then looks back at the letter, reading, "I can begin to trust you again."
Ross looks up at Chandler and Joey, raising his voice slightly on the word "responsibility?", then looks back at the letter, reading, "I can begin to trust you again."
Ross continues reading from the letter, "Does that seem like something you can do?"
Ross lowers the letter, looks directly at Joey, and asks, "Does it?"

Ross nods slightly, turning his gaze toward Chandler.

Ross sits down in an armchair next to the couch, looking at the letter in his hands.
